text.title: Slash-Command Surface for PR Review Bots Failure Modes
text.summary: Three antipatterns observed in real slash-command bot deployments. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Reviewer notes erased every time `/describe` re-runs; reviewers stop adding context.
antipattern.root-cause: No AUTO-DESCRIBE markers; whole PR body replaced on each describe.
antipattern.fix: Add AUTO-DESCRIBE-START/END markers in the PR template; set KEEP_ORIGINAL_USER_TITLE=true.

antipattern.symptom: Reviewers ignore every bot comment; PR threads have 20 unread suggestion patches.
antipattern.fix: Set auto_improve=false; require explicit `/improve` PR comment to invoke.

antipattern.symptom: Bot loops on its own comments; GitHub API quota burns out within hours.
antipattern.fix: Add `if: ${{ github.event.sender.type != 'Bot' }}` on every job triggered by issue_comment.
